    have h₅ : ∀ (v w : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (c : ℝ), fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      intro v w c
      have h₆ : HasFDerivAt ℝ F (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (0, (0 : ℝ)) := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.hasFDerivAt
        exact hF_diff.differentiableAt
      have h₇ : HasFDerivAt ℝ F (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (0, (0 : ℝ)) := h₆
      have h₈ : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        have h₉ : (v + w, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, (1 : ℝ)) + (w, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          ext <;> simp [add_assoc]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [add_assoc])
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all)
        rw [h₉]
        have h₁₀ : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) ((v, (1 : ℝ)) + (w, (1 : ℝ))) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          apply h₇.add
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₈
    have h₆ : (∀ (v w : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (c : ℝ), fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (c • v, (1 : ℝ)) = c • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ))) := by
      intro v w c
      have h₇ : HasFDerivAt ℝ F (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (0, (0 : ℝ)) := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.hasFDerivAt
        exact hF_diff.differentiableAt
      have h₈ : HasFDerivAt ℝ F (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (0, (0 : ℝ)) := h₇
      have h₉ : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (c • v, (1 : ℝ)) = c • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        have h₁₀ : (c • v, (1 : ℝ)) = c • (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          ext <;> simp [smul_eq_mul] <;>
          (try simp_all [smul_eq_mul]) <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all) <;>
          (try linarith)
        rw [h₁₀]
        have h₁₁ : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (c • (v, (1 : ℝ))) = c • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          apply h₈.smul
        exact h₁₁
      exact h₉
    -- Define g such that g = (deriv F (0, 0)) (1, 0)
    have h₇ : ∃ (g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
      use (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (1, (0 : ℝ)))
      intro v
      have h₈ := h₄ v
      have h₉ := h₄ (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))
      have h₁₀ := h₄ (v + (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)))
      have h₁₁ := h₄ (v - (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)))
      have h₁₂ := h₅ v 0 1
      have h₁₃ := h₅ 0 v 1
      have h₁₄ := h₅ v (-v) 1
      have h₁₅ := h₆ v 0 1
      have h₁₆ := h₆ 0 v 1
      have h₁₇ := h₆ v 1 1
      have h₁₈ := h₆ v (-1) 1
      simp at h₈ h₉ h₁₀ h₁₁ h₁₂ h₁₃ h₁₄ h₁₅ h₁₆ h₁₇ h₁₈
      <;>
      (try simp_all [hδL0]) <;>
      (try simp_all [hF]) <;>
      (try simp_all [hF_diff]) <;>
      (try simp_all [h₄]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all) <;>
      (try field_simp at * <;> simp_all) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_right, InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_left, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          simp_all [hδL0]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_right, InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_left, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          simp_all [hδL0]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_right, InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_left, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          simp_all [hδL0]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_right, InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_left, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          simp_all [hδL0]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_right, InnerProductSpace.inner_smul_left, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          simp_all [hδL0]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
    exact h₇
  exact h₃
